reviews.review_title: Should be more of these games
reviews.review_description: Having fun so far, I love these types of games. Needs some work with the tutorial when you press to battle it just sits and won't load .  Keep updating this game. It should be easier to find in the store. Good work, Devs

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot, Bintryin! We're really glad you're enjoying the game and appreciate you pointing out the tutorial issue — we're on it and working on a fix. Thanks again for the support!

reviews.review_description: Great graphics but no campaign or real online players. Playing against AI gets boring.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, Mushu411. We're glad you liked the graphics, and we hear you on the need for more content. A full campaign mode is in the works and will be released soon — stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
I can zone out on impossible 4 4ever.
Dope game good graphics.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words, DysKnect420! Really glad you’re enjoying Impossible 4 — appreciate you taking the time to leave a review.

reviews.review_description: No, it’s not unplayable, but given this last update, the enemy starts out with like four or five units on the map. I get that you probably wanted to make the game more challenging, but you gave the AI too much power and now it’s not fun to play. And the AI the only one I can play with since multiplayer doesn’t work. ￼

developer_response.body:
Hi The_Homel4nder,

Thank you for your feedback — we really appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts. We increased the difficulty in the latest update to make the game more challenging and engaging, but we definitely don’t want it to feel unfair.

Could you let us know what level you’ve reached and how long you’ve been playing the game? This will help us better understand your experience and make necessary adjustments.

Thanks again for your input — it really helps us make the game better.

Best regards,
The Expansion VR Team

reviews.review_description: It's really good fun while it lasts,  there's a mutiplaying option but that's not my thing.

developer_response.body:
Hello Punilux62, thank you for your review!
Please check out the recent update — we’ve implemented balance changes and added new content, including new maps and difficulty levels. There’s now even more for you to enjoy and explore!

Best regards,
Expansion VR Team

reviews.review_description:
I was able to snag this in app lab back in the early days of its development. It's a fun little RTS game with charming characters, surprisingly good graphics (better than many AAA titles) and balanced gameplay. Manipulating the battlefield to any size you want is a nice feature. The difficulty is just about right, and there is nearly endless replayability. This is a steal at its current price.

Fun game! Easy mechanics but very cool. Please keep developing it because it can become a great game. More troops, more maps, more game mods. On a side note, think about developing also the ship. I found sitting in my ship to plan next match very relaxing. Tons of potential!

Love this cute little strategy game. Your given a few options to load on the battle field. Your Energy loads as time goes. Your opponent will try and load there battle died with better troops to take you out. Don’t let them get to close! If they take out your towers it’s only the beginning! Lol hop on give it a try definitely worth a try.❤️

This game is soooo much fun! I can’t believe this game is free. Multiplayer is a blast! My cousin and I are addicted to this game! This is an extremely well made tower defense game with fantastic highly polished graphics. Lots of imaginative characters and vehicles that animate very well. As you progress you can get more characters. Best of all you can shrink and enlarge the playfield by just moving your hands in and out like in the game Demeo. What an incredible perspective when the chracters are full size and you are standing right in the middle of the battle. Great theme music too! It looks like they are still working on it and I hope to see some improvements in the following areas. When joining multiplayer it just randomly looks for an online player for you. This should be done with a room code. Since this is new you will probably be joined with your friend since not many have discovered this game yet. Also, instead of gaining new characters randomly as you play, you should gain credits that you build up as you play and be able to choose who your next character is based on your credits. Also, the sound effects you can only hear when you get closer to the action. There should be an option to increase the sound of the effects to increase immersion. Overall this is a great game with tons of replay value. Hope to see this in the main store once completely finished. It’s so close to being perfect!
